title: keep_hierarchy Verilog attribute leading to unconstrained top level ports from internal signals

features.name: keep_hierarchy attribute on submodule instance
features.description: Code should include a module instance annotated with the keep_hierarchy Verilog attribute set to TRUE, placed inside a non-top module

features.name: multi-level hierarchy with preserved sub-module boundaries
features.description: Code should include a three-level module hierarchy where a top module instantiates a mid-level module which in turn instantiates a leaf module, with internal signals that must not propagate to the top-level ports

features.name: internal signal leakage across hierarchy boundary
features.description: Code should include an internal wire in a preserved-hierarchy submodule that is used only internally but may be incorrectly promoted as a top-level port during synthesis
